en: Continue
zh: 继续

en: Stranded Trader
zh: 困在荒野的商人

en: A merchant's rig sits dead in the cracked salt-flat, one wheel buried. He squints at you over a dust-caked scarf, hand never far from his holster.
zh: 一辆商队车死在龟裂的盐碱地上，一只轮子陷进沙里。他从蒙尘的围巾上方眯眼打量你，手始终没离开枪套。

en: Help dig the rig free (he pays you +40 gold)
zh: 帮他把车挖出来（他付你 +40 金币）

en: Hours of shoveling later the rig lurches loose. He counts forty into your palm and rolls off into the haze.
zh: 铲了几个钟头，车终于猛地松脱。他数了四十枚塞进你掌心，碾着尘雾扬长而去。

en: [Charm 5] Sweet-talk a parting gift from his crate
zh: [魅力 5] 甜言蜜语，从他的货箱里讨件临别礼

en: Your easy smile wins him over. He digs out a Lucky Cog and presses it into your hand for the company.
zh: 你随和的笑容打动了他。他翻出一枚幸运齿轮，塞进你手里，谢你一路作伴。

en: [Luck] Roll his weighted dice for the strongbox
zh: [幸运] 用他灌了铅的骰子赌那只保险箱

en: The bones come up sevens. He grumbles and tosses you the core from the strongbox.
zh: 骰子掷出七点。他嘟囔着，把保险箱里的核心抛给你。

en: Snake eyes. He laughs, draws iron, and clips your shoulder before you back off.
zh: 两个一点。他大笑，拔枪，在你退开前擦伤了你的肩膀。

en: Buried Cache
zh: 埋藏的暗格

en: A rusted hatch juts from the dune, half-swallowed by sand. Old militia markings warn of a sealed supply vault beneath. The lock looks ready to give.
zh: 一扇锈蚀的舱盖从沙丘里探出，半埋在沙中。旧民兵的标记警告下方封着一座补给库。那把锁看起来快撑不住了。

en: Pry it open and grab the gear
zh: 撬开它，把装备拿走

en: The hatch shrieks open. Inside, vacuum-sealed and waiting, sits a piece of pre-collapse equipment.
zh: 舱盖刺耳地弹开。里头真空封存着一件大崩溃前的装备，静静等着。

en: [Luck] Trust the rotting floor and dive deep
zh: [幸运] 赌那腐朽的地板，深入下去

en: The boards hold. In the deepest locker you find a rare relic of the old world and a cache of coin.
zh: 木板撑住了。在最深处的储物柜里，你找到一件旧世界的稀有遗物，还有一小笔藏起来的钱。

en: The floor caves. You crash through onto twisted rebar and crawl out empty-handed and bleeding.
zh: 地板塌了。你摔在扭曲的钢筋上，空着手、淌着血爬了出来。

en: The Hooded Stranger
zh: 兜帽下的陌生人

en: By a guttering fire sits a figure swathed in grey rags, face lost in shadow. A cracked deck of fortune cards waits face-down on a flat stone between you.
zh: 将熄的篝火旁坐着一个裹着灰布的身影，脸隐在阴影里。你们之间的一块平石上，扣着一副残破的命运卡。

en: Share your rations and your story
zh: 分享你的口粮和你的故事

en: The stranger listens, mends your wounds with a salve, and something in the telling leaves you steadier with people.
zh: 陌生人静静听着，用药膏替你敷好伤口；讲述之间，你与人相处也多了几分从容。

en: [Charm 5] Read the future in their cards
zh: [魅力 5] 请他用卡牌为你卜算未来

en: They deal three cards, nod slowly, and trace your fortune. You leave feeling the dice will fall your way.
zh: 他发出三张牌，缓缓点头，为你描出命数。你离开时，只觉骰子都会向着你落。

en: [Luck] Cut the deck and take what fate gives
zh: [幸运] 切牌，听凭命运给什么就拿什么

en: You turn the Sun. The stranger gifts you a keen Scavenger Lens and vanishes into the dark.
zh: 你翻出『太阳』。陌生人赠你一具精良的拾荒者透镜，随即没入黑暗。

en: You turn the Tower. A cold dread bleeds your vigor, though a few coins spill from the deck as consolation.
zh: 你翻出『高塔』。一阵彻骨的不安抽走你的精气，所幸牌堆里散落几枚硬币，权当安慰。

en: Rad Storm
zh: 辐射风暴

en: The sky bruises green and a screaming wind drives glowing dust toward you. There is no outrunning it — only a choice of how to weather the surge.
zh: 天空泛起淤青般的绿，呼啸的狂风卷着发光的尘埃扑面而来。你跑不赢它——只能选择如何熬过这阵浪潮。

en: Hunker down and ride it out (lose 4 HP)
zh: 蜷下身子硬扛过去（失去 4 点生命）

en: You wrap up tight and breathe through your scarf. The storm flays your skin raw but passes you by.
zh: 你裹紧自己，隔着围巾呼吸。风暴把你的皮肤刮得生疼，但终究放过了你。

en: [Charm 5] Wave down a passing convoy for shelter
zh: [魅力 5] 拦下过路的车队求个庇护

en: Your frantic charm earns a wave back. They haul you into a sealed truck, patch you up, and slip you some coin for the road.
zh: 你拼命挥手、巧言相求，换来对方回应。他们把你拽进密封货车，替你包扎，还塞给你些路费。

en: [Luck] Sprint through the glow toward a bunker
zh: [幸运] 冲过辉光，奔向一座地堡

en: You thread the worst of it and slam the bunker hatch. Inside, an intact core hums in the dark — and you feel charmed.
zh: 你穿过最凶的一段，砰地关上地堡舱门。黑暗里，一枚完好的核心嗡嗡作响——你只觉时运在身。

en: The storm catches you in the open. You reach the bunker scorched and retching, the dose still burning in your lungs.
zh: 风暴在旷野里逮住了你。你抵达地堡时焦灼欲呕，那股辐射还在肺里灼烧。

en: The Mutant Bazaar
zh: 变异者集市

en: Under a tarp of stitched hides, a four-armed trader fans out salvage across a battered table. Every price is a starting price — if you can talk fast enough.
zh: 拼缝兽皮的篷布下，一个四臂商人把废件摊满破桌。每个价码都只是起价——只要你嘴皮子够快。

en: Pay full price for a charm trinket
zh: 照单全价买下一件饰物

en: You count out the coin without quibbling. The trader's four hands wrap your purchase and slide it across the table.
zh: 你二话不说数出钱来。商人四只手裹好你买的东西，推过桌面。

en: [Charm 6] Haggle him down to a steal
zh: [魅力 6] 把他砍到血亏价

en: Your patter is silk. He laughs, throws in a Repair Kit for the road, and even refunds a handful of coin to keep your favor.
zh: 你说得天花乱坠。他大笑，搭送一只修理包上路用，还退你一把硬币，只为讨你欢心。

en: Browse and move on
zh: 随便看看就走

en: You drift the stalls, trade a few quiet words, and leave a touch more practiced at reading a room.
zh: 你在摊位间游荡，低声寒暄几句，离开时识人察色又老练了几分。

en: The Fortune Shrine
zh: 命运神龛

en: A crude altar of welded scrap leans in the dust, ringed with offered coins and spent shell casings. A cracked dice cup sits at its center, daring you.
zh: 一座焊废件而成的粗陋祭坛斜倚在尘土里，四周环着供奉的硬币和打空的弹壳。中央摆着一只裂了口的骰盅，向你挑衅。

en: Leave a coin offering and walk on
zh: 留下一枚硬币供奉，转身离开

en: You drop a coin in the dust and bow your head. Something in the gesture leaves you feeling the odds bend a little your way.
zh: 你把一枚硬币丢进尘里，低头致意。这一拜之间，你只觉胜算朝自己偏了几分。

en: [Luck] Roll the cracked dice for the shrine's hoard
zh: [幸运] 掷那只裂口骰子，赌神龛的窖藏

en: The dice come up blessed. The altar's false floor gives, spilling a Lucky Cog and a scatter of coin into your hands.
zh: 骰子掷出福兆。祭坛的暗格塌开，一枚幸运齿轮和一把散币落进你手心。

en: Snake eyes. The scrap altar lurches and a hidden spike rakes your arm as you snatch your hand back empty.
zh: 两个一点。废件祭坛猛地一晃，一根暗藏的尖刺在你空手缩回时划过手臂。

en: The Caravan Checkpoint
zh: 商队检查站

en: A makeshift toll gate of oil drums and razor wire blocks the dry riverbed. Two guards in mismatched armor lounge in the shade, rifles across their knees, watching you approach.
zh: 油桶和刺网搭成的临时关卡拦住了干涸的河床。两名穿着杂色护甲的卫兵懒洋洋地靠在阴影里，步枪横在膝上，看着你走近。

en: Help the guards reset a fallen drum to earn passage
zh: 帮卫兵扶起倒下的油桶，换取通行

en: You heave the toppled oil drum back onto the wire. The lead guard grunts, flips you a few coins for the trouble, and waves you through.
zh: 你把倒下的油桶重新架回刺网上。领头的卫兵哼了一声，扔给你几枚硬币当辛苦费，挥手放你过去。

en: [Charm 5] Talk your way past — and out of an old contact's debt
zh: [魅力 5] 靠嘴皮子通关——顺便了结一段旧人情

en: Turns out you know the lead guard's cousin. A few right names later he not only waves you through, he settles an old marker in your favor.
zh: 原来你认识领头卫兵的表亲。报上几个对的名字后，他不仅放你通行，还顺手帮你了结了一笔旧账，对你有利。

en: [Luck] Bluff a hidden escort and dare them to stop you
zh: [幸运] 虚张声势说自己有暗哨，量他们不敢拦

en: You let your eyes flick to the ridgeline like backup waits there. They blink first, lower the wire, and even toss you a toll refund to stay friendly.
zh: 你故意瞟向山脊，仿佛援军就埋伏在那。他们先怂了，放下刺网，甚至退给你过路费以示交好。

en: They call your bluff. A warning shot goes wide but the second clips you before you're back over the riverbank.
zh: 他们识破了你的虚张声势。第一枪警告打偏，但你还没退回河岸，第二枪就擦中了你。

en: The Collapsed Overpass
zh: 坍塌的高架桥

en: A highway overpass lies snapped across the canyon, its rusted rebar clawing at the sky. A glint of an old supply cache shows in the rubble — but the whole slab groans whenever the wind shifts.
zh: 一座高架公路桥拦腰断在峡谷上，锈蚀的钢筋刺向天空。瓦砾间闪着旧补给箱的微光——可每当风向一变，整块桥板就发出呻吟。

en: Pick the wreckage clean, slow and careful
zh: 慢慢来、小心翼翼地把残骸捡干净

en: You spend the afternoon prying loose what won't bring the slab down. A modest haul of scrap and coin, and all your fingers intact.
zh: 你花了一下午，撬下那些不会引发坍塌的东西。废料和钱币收获不多，但十根手指都还在。

en: [Charm 5] Flag down a passing scav crew to brace it for a cut
zh: [魅力 5] 拦下路过的拾荒队，分成请他们撑住桥板

en: Your easy patter wins over the scav crew. They jack the slab on hydraulics, you split the cache, and everyone walks away richer.
zh: 你三言两语就说动了拾荒队。他们用液压顶撑起桥板，你们平分了补给，各自满载而归。

en: [Luck] Crawl under the groaning slab for the deep cache
zh: [幸运] 钻到呻吟的桥板下，去掏最深处的补给

en: The slab holds. You drag out a sealed crate of refined core and a fat purse before scrambling clear.
zh: 桥板撑住了。你拖出一箱密封的精炼核心和一只鼓囊囊的钱袋，赶在塌落前爬了出来。

en: The wind shifts. Concrete shears loose and pins your leg — you wrench free bleeding, the cache buried for good.
zh: 风向变了。混凝土崩落，压住了你的腿——你流着血挣脱出来，补给就此永远埋在了下面。

en: Humming Strongbox
zh: 嗡鸣保险箱

en: A dented strongbox hums on a cracked altar, leaking sickly green light through its seams. Coins glint inside — but the air tastes of rot and bad luck.
zh: 一只凹陷的保险箱在龟裂的祭台上嗡嗡作响，缝隙里渗出病态的绿光。里面有金币闪烁——可空气里弥漫着腐烂与霉运的味道。

en: Crack it open and pocket the coins
zh: 撬开它，把金币塞进兜里

en: Coins spill into your hands — and a film of orange rust creeps up your arm. A curse settles into your pack.
zh: 金币落进你手心——一层橙色的锈迹顺着手臂爬上来。一张诅咒钻进了你的行囊。

en: Leave it. Nothing glows green for free.
zh: 走开。会发绿光的东西没一样是白送的。

en: You back away. The box hums on, waiting for someone greedier.
zh: 你退开了。箱子继续嗡鸣，等着更贪心的人。

en: Torn Coin Pouch
zh: 破洞钱袋

en: A jittery drifter shoves a bulging coin-pouch into your hands and bolts before you can refuse. The seams are split and weeping rust — coins already trickling out between your fingers.
zh: 一个慌张的流浪汉把一只鼓胀的钱袋塞进你手里，没等你拒绝就溜了。缝线开裂、渗着锈迹——硬币已经从你指缝间漏了出来。

en: Pocket it — coin is coin (+100 Gold)
zh: 收下吧——钱就是钱（+100 金币）

en: You stuff the pouch away, a hundred richer. But the tear won't hold — with every step, a coin or two slips loose into the dust behind you.
zh: 你把钱袋塞好，凭空多了一百。可那道裂口撑不住——你每走一步，就有一两枚硬币漏进身后的尘土。

en: Drop it and walk away
zh: 丢下它，转身就走

en: You let the cursed thing fall. Whatever's wrong with it, it isn't your problem now.
zh: 你松手让那不祥之物落地。不管它出了什么毛病，现在都不关你的事了。

en: The Deserter's Charm
zh: 逃兵的护符

en: A rusted charm dangles from a deserter's sun-bleached skull, still faintly warm. They say it kept its last owner breathing — by making them run from every fight they could.
zh: 一枚锈蚀的护符悬在逃兵被晒白的头骨上，仍带着微温。据说它让上一个主人活了下来——代价是让他逢战必逃。

en: Wear it — survival first (Heal to full)
zh: 戴上它——保命要紧（回满生命）

en: Warmth floods your wounds and they knit shut in seconds. But a cold thread of dread settles in with it — your hands won't stop wanting to flee.
zh: 暖意涌进你的伤口，几秒便愈合如初。但一缕冰冷的怯意也随之钻入——你的双手再也按捺不住想逃的冲动。

en: Let the dead keep it
zh: 让逝者留着它

en: You leave the charm with its owner. Some bargains aren't worth the asking.
zh: 你把护符留给它的主人。有些交易，光是开口就已经太贵。

en: Pre-War Auto-Injector
zh: 战前肾上腺素针

en: A military auto-injector, its glass barrel sloshing with something that glows a sickly amber. One dose of pre-war combat serum — guaranteed to make you hit harder, and flinch at every shadow after.
zh: 一支军用自动注射器，玻璃管里晃荡着泛出病态琥珀光的液体。一剂战前作战血清——保证让你出手更狠，此后却会对每一道阴影都心惊肉跳。

en: Jam it in — feel the burn (+1 Strength, permanent)
zh: 扎下去——感受那股灼烧（力量 +1，永久）

en: Fire roars up your arm and your muscles sing — you're stronger, lastingly so. But your heart won't slow, and every noise jolts you half out of your skin.
zh: 烈焰顺着手臂炸开，你的肌肉为之轰鸣——你变强了，持久地强。可你的心跳再不肯慢下来，任何响动都吓得你魂飞魄散。

en: Crush the vial underfoot
zh: 一脚碾碎药瓶

en: You grind the injector into the dirt. Whatever edge it offered, the price reads too steep.
zh: 你把注射器碾进泥里。不管它能给什么好处，这价码都太狠了。
